data.body: MODULE-SIZE FIX + RE-PUSH. After rebasing onto origin/main, passes.py hit 871 > ceiling 861 (a8e5's operator-attested coach move 14 stacked on top of d4cf's move 13). Bumped passes.py ceiling 861->871 in a8e5's commit (+ architecture.md note); a8e5's isolated tree is 862 and d4cf 871, so the bump had to live in a8e5 (lowest commit over 861). This amend likely stales a8e5/d4cf completion attestations (sha-bound) — will re-close them after landing if the epic reads certifiable:false. Re-pushed all 10 (608-617) fresh patchsets to gerrit refs/for/main (SUCCESS). Now awaiting fresh Verified+MAX + LLM-Review+MAX on all 10; then SUBMIT to land (epic AC1 needs changes on main), then epic AC2 comment + close epic (re-closing a8e5/d4cf first if needed to keep the epic signed).
